description_long: This rifle features a long, rectangular body with a series of raised, boxy segments along its upper surface, suggesting a robust and utilitarian design. The exterior appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with visible weathering and discoloration, indicating heavy use or exposure to the elements. Several mechanical components, such as levers, knobs, and protruding fixtures, are distributed along the sides, hinting at complex internal mechanisms. The coloration is predominantly a mix of gray, greenish, and brown tones, with some red accents visible on one side, possibly for safety or operational indicators. The rifle lacks a traditional stock and barrel profile, instead presenting a blocky, industrial form factor. No clear sighting system or muzzle device is visible, and the magazine appears to be integrated or internal.
description: A long, industrial-style rifle with a boxy metal body, weathered finish, and multiple mechanical fixtures. The design is utilitarian, with muted colors and no visible stock or sight.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the rear, showing the length of the body and the raised segments along the top.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the boxy compartments and mechanical details, with some discoloration and surface wear.
description_view_2: The front end is visible, highlighting the squared-off muzzle and the linear arrangement of the upper segments.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays additional red accents and more mechanical fixtures along the body.
